case_title: CRESPO JOSE T. VS HARSH DENNIS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $457.60 FILED BY CRESPO JOSE T. AS TO DEFENDANT HARSH DENNIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-23-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
